title: Shri Naina Devi Temple, Himachal Pradesh
intro: Shri Naina Devi Temple, located in the Bilaspur district of Himachal Pradesh, is one of the most sacred Shakti Peethas in India. This temple is dedicated to the 'eyes' (Naina) of Mother Sati.
description:
Shri Naina Devi Temple – Bilaspur, Himachal Pradesh
Introduction
Shri Naina Devi Temple, located in the Bilaspur district of Himachal Pradesh, is one of the most sacred Shakti Peethas in India. This temple is dedicated to the 'eyes' (Naina) of Mother Sati. Situated on a hilltop, the temple is famous not only for its religious significance but also for the mesmerizing views of the surrounding hills.
Temple Information
 Temple Name: Shri Naina Devi Temple
 Location: Naina Devi, Bilaspur District, Himachal Pradesh 174310
 Presiding Goddess: Mother Naina Devi
 Significance: One of the 51 Shakti Peethas.
History and Significance
According to mythology, when Lord Shiva was carrying the mortal remains of Goddess Sati across the sky, her 'eyes' fell at this spot, leading to the name 'Naina Devi'. Devotees believe that a visit here brings clarity to life and can help alleviate eye-related ailments.
How to Reach
✈️ By Air: Chandigarh International Airport is the nearest major airport (approx. 100 km).
🚆 By Train: Anandpur Sahib is the nearest railway station (approx. 20 km). Taxis and buses are easily available from there.
🛣️ By Road: The temple is well-connected to Chandigarh, Bilaspur, and major cities in Punjab. A 'Ropeway' facility is also available to reach the temple top.
Best Time to Visit
 Ideal Time for Travel: September to March.
 Special Occasions: Huge crowds gather during Navratri and Shravan Ashtami.
Temple Timings
🕒 Timing: Generally from 5:00 AM to 9:00 PM.
Nearby Attractions
 Gobind Sagar Lake
 Bhakra Nangal Dam
 Anandpur Sahib (Gurudwara)
Conclusion
Naina Devi Temple is a center of faith where nature and divinity meet. A visit here provides immense peace and positive energy to the devotees.

faq.q1: To which Goddess is the Naina Devi Temple dedicated?
faq.a1: This temple is dedicated to Mother Naina Devi.
faq.q2: Where is the Naina Devi Temple located?
faq.a2: It is located in Naina Devi, Bilaspur district, Himachal Pradesh.
faq.q3: What is the Naina Devi Temple famous for?
faq.a3: It is famous as a major Shakti Peeth and for the profound devotion of Mata Naina Devi.
faq.q4: What is the best time to visit the Naina Devi Temple?
faq.a4: The period from September to March is considered ideal for travel.
faq.q5: What are the major festivals of the Naina Devi Temple?
faq.a5: Shravan Ashtami Mela, Chaitra Navratri, and Sharad Navratri are the major festivals.
